---
title: "10. 明照与分辨"
subtitle: "Illumination, Discernment, and Clarity"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 10
categories: [i-ching, cultural, omega]
description: "How seeing, concealment, distinction, estrangement, and travel map cognition onto spectral separation, resolution levels, and distortion-limited perception."
---

**Hexagrams:** 蒙(4), 观(20), 贲(22), 离(30), 晋(35), 明夷(36), 睽(38), 困(47), 旅(56)  
**Omega Directions:** `spectral theory`, `modular tower inverse limit`, `rate-distortion`

{{< include articles/category_10_illumination_discernment_clarity.md >}}

---

[Back to I Ching Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)


## Infographic

![category_10_illumination_discernment_clarity Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_10_illumination_discernment_clarity_infographic.png)

## Video

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_10_illumination_discernment_clarity_video.mp4 >}}

**Media Downloads:**

- [Infographic (PNG)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_10_illumination_discernment_clarity_infographic.png)

- [Slides (PDF)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_10_illumination_discernment_clarity_slides.pdf)
